name: surface
title: Surface
description: Foundational container with intent-based or background-based coloring, elevation, edges, radius, and interactive states.

consumption.typeImport: import type { SurfaceProps, SurfaceIntent, SurfaceBackground, SurfaceContrast, SurfaceElevation, SurfaceEdge, SurfaceRadius, SurfaceRadiusPreset, SurfaceElement } from '@compomo/ui';

intent.description: Semantic intent coloring (mutually exclusive with background).

edge.description: Border edges. Only applies when elevation is none.
